title: Contact | Your Business
description: A business-site starter contact page that can stay email-first or link to an external booking flow.
heroTitle: Give people one clear way to move forward
heroText: Use this page for direct contact, a quote request, or one clean booking link. Keep the next step specific and avoid making people choose between too many weak options.

cards.title: Good reasons to get in touch
cards.text: A project enquiry, a scope question, a capability check, a request for availability, or a first call to see if the fit is real.

cards.title: What helps first
cards.text: A short note on goals, timing, budget range, or current blockers usually makes the next step faster and more useful.

faq.question: Do I need to know the exact scope before reaching out?
faq.answer: No. A short description of the problem, timing, or outcome you need is usually enough for a first reply.

faq.question: Can this page stay email-only?
faq.answer: Yes. Keep booking.mode on contact-only if you want direct contact without an external booking step.
